title: 2023 Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This is a chronological index/listing page of all Federal Reserve Board press releases issued during calendar year 2023. The page aggregates dozens of diverse announcements including FOMC minutes, enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, and institutional announcements. As a listing page rather than a single document, it is non-archiveable as a standalone research record.
key_points: Source is a listing page containing multiple event types: FOMC minutes releases (October, August, November), enforcement actions, regulatory proposals, banking applications, and institutional announcements
FOMC minutes releases noted include October 31-November 1, 2023 (released November 21), September 19-20, 2023 (released October 11), and July 25-26, 2023 (released August 16)
Notable enforcement actions include fines against Metropolitan Commercial Bank (~$14.5 million) and Regions Bank (~$2.95 million)
Regulatory activity includes proposed rules on large bank capital requirements, long-term debt requirements, interchange fee caps, and Community Reinvestment Act modernization
No explicit interest rate decisions are visible in the truncated listing
Page covers entire 2023 calendar year—historical record as of TODAY (2026-03-31)
why_it_matters: This listing page serves as a directory to 2023 Fed communications but is not itself an archiveable research document. Individual press releases should be retrieved and archived separately for meaningful RAG use.
notes: CLASSIFICATION: Non-archivable. This is a listing/index page containing multiple event types from calendar year 2023. Per CORE RULES rule 6, listing pages are treated as non-archiveable. The FOMC minutes releases and other individual announcements referenced here should be accessed directly as separate documents for proper archival. Source predates TODAY by over 2 years, lowering relevance for near-term macro catalysts analysis.
